intro.title: Redraw Your Circle
intro.p1: At different points in life, our support system can shift. 🌱 Sometimes we feel connected and supported. Other times, things may feel distant or unclear.
intro.p2: This activity is a space to pause and look at the people around you — and understand who currently feels part of your circle. 💛
intro.p3: There's no right or wrong here. Just awareness. ✨
intro.italic: 🌿 Your circle can change — and that's okay.

circle.subtitle: Who is in your support system?
circle.title: Who's In Your Circle Right Now? 🔮
circle.desc: Think about the people in your life and where they show up for you.
circle.instruction: 👆 Tap each bubble and add someone who fits that space in your life.
circle.italic: 🤍 It's okay if your circle feels small.
prompts: A person you can talk to

reflection.subtitle: Final reflections
reflection.title: What Do You Notice?
reflection.p_intro: Take a moment to look at your circle. You might notice:
list: Some people feel closer than others
There may be gaps — or just a few meaningful people
reflection.italic: Awareness is the first step toward building the connections you value. 🧘
reflection.label: 💭 Is there anyone you'd like to feel more connected to?

history.title: Your Circles History
history.subtitle: A record of your support system over time.

common.completion_message: You've successfully completed this activity. Take a moment to appreciate your progress.
